header.title: JSON Diff — Compare & Highlight JSON Differences Online
header.description: Free online JSON diff tool to compare two JSON objects and instantly see differences. Highlights additions, deletions, and modifications with color-coded side-by-side view. Essential for debugging API responses and JSON configuration changes.
header.keywords: json diff, compare json, json comparison, json difference checker, diff json files, json comparator, json diff tool, json side by side

howToUse.title: How to Use the JSON Diff Tool
howToUse.step1Desc: Paste the original JSON on the left and the modified JSON on the right.
howToUse.step2Desc: The tool highlights additions in green, removals in red, and changes in yellow.
howToUse.step3Desc: Toggle Hide Unchanged to focus only on differences, or expand/collapse all nodes.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click Report to generate a summary of all changes between the two JSON objects.

items.question: What types of differences can this tool detect?
items.answer: It detects added, removed, and changed values, as well as type changes (e.g., string to number).

items.question: Can I copy the diff results?
items.answer: Yes. The tool provides a Report feature that generates a text summary of all differences.

items.question: Does the tool support nested JSON?
items.answer: Yes. The diff view supports deeply nested objects and arrays with expandable tree nodes.

items.question: Is there a way to hide unchanged values?
items.answer: Yes. Toggle Hide Unchanged to show only the properties that differ between the two JSON objects.

examples.title: Example Results
examples.result: age changed (25 → 30) · city added ("NYC") — 2 changes found
